endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Data Lake Store REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists the Data Lake Store accounts within the subscription. The response includes a link to the next page of results, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/locations/{location}/capability
endpoints.description: Gets subscription-level properties and limits for Data Lake Store specified by resource location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/locations/{location}/checkNameAvailability
endpoints.description: Checks whether the specified account name is available or taken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/locations/{location}/usages
endpoints.description: Gets the current usage count and the limit for the resources of the location under the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists the Data Lake Store accounts within a specific resource group. The response includes a link to the next page of results, if any.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Creates the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified Data Lake Store account information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/enableKeyVault
endpoints.description: Attempts to enable a user managed Key Vault for encryption of the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/firewallRules
endpoints.description: Lists the Data Lake Store firewall rules within the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/firewallRules/{firewallRuleName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Data Lake Store firewall rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLRULENAME}} with a real firewallrulename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/firewallRules/{firewallRuleName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the specified firewall rule. During update, the firewall rule with the specified name will be replaced with this new firewall rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLRULENAME}} with a real firewallrulename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/firewallRules/{firewallRuleName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified firewall rule from the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLRULENAME}} with a real firewallrulename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/firewallRules/{firewallRuleName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified firewall rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{FIREWALLRULENAME}} with a real firewallrulename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/trustedIdProviders
endpoints.description: Lists the Data Lake Store trusted identity providers within the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/trustedIdProviders/{trustedIdProviderName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Data Lake Store trusted identity provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TRUSTEDIDPROVIDERNAME}} with a real trustedidprovidername.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/trustedIdProviders/{trustedIdProviderName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the specified trusted identity provider. During update, the trusted identity provider with the specified name will be replaced with this new provider
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TRUSTEDIDPROVIDERNAME}} with a real trustedidprovidername.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/trustedIdProviders/{trustedIdProviderName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified trusted identity provider from the specified Data Lake Store account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TRUSTEDIDPROVIDERNAME}} with a real trustedidprovidername.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/trustedIdProviders/{trustedIdProviderName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified trusted identity provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{TRUSTEDIDPROVIDERNAME}} with a real trustedidprovidername.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/virtualNetworkRules
endpoints.description: Lists the Data Lake Store virtual network rules within the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/virtualNetworkRules/{virtualNetworkRuleName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified Data Lake Store virtual network rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKRULENAME}} with a real virtualnetworkrulename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/virtualNetworkRules/{virtualNetworkRuleName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the specified virtual network rule. During update, the virtual network rule with the specified name will be replaced with this new virtual network rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKRULENAME}} with a real virtualnetworkrulename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/virtualNetworkRules/{virtualNetworkRuleName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified virtual network rule from the specified Data Lake Store account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKRULENAME}} with a real virtualnetworkrulename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DataLakeStore/accounts/{accountName}/virtualNetworkRules/{virtualNetworkRuleName}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified virtual network rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTNAME}} with a real accountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKRULENAME}} with a real virtualnetworkrulename.
